description: Fair Price Shop management platform for Gujarat's Public Distribution System (PDS). Replaces the slow, insecure government FPS portal with a modern, secure system featuring Fastify backend with 18 modules, Next.js frontend, PostgreSQL 16, Redis 7, and BullMQ workers. Note: this project has over 100 source files; consider scoping analysis to a subdirectory for faster results.
name: eFPS Intelligence
